Requirements
site.hclose
site.br
projects.cluster.overview.1: Simplicity! Above all else, with the exception of high assurance, the cluster must be simple. Where complexity encroaches, it must be elegant
and it must solve a specific problem — not introduce complexity for the sake of complexity.
projects.cluster.overview.2: High Availability, and High Assurance! No data corruption, high uptime, data recovery.
